retrieved_result: What is the definition of a LEAD, ACCOUNT and an OPPORTUNITY? Amanda Andrews What is the definition of a LEAD, ACCOUNT and an OPPORTUNITY? AND, once you convert a contact to a lead and assign it to someone else, how do you keep it as a contact? March 30, 2012 · Answer · Like 2 · Follow 0Laura Bell A lead is a prospect that needs to be qualified as a real sales
